hibernate-mapping.query: SELECT p FROM com.mckesson.eig.workflow.process.api.ProcessVersionInfo AS p INNER JOIN p.processInfo.assignedActors AS assignedActors WHERE assignedActors.actor.actorID = (:P_ACTOR_ID) AND p.versionId = (SELECT MAX(procV.versionId) FROM com.mckesson.eig.workflow.process.api.ProcessVersionInfo procV WHERE procV.processInfo.processId = p.processInfo.processId)

SELECT pr FROM com.mckesson.eig.workflow.process.api.ProcessVersionInfo pr INNER JOIN pr.processInfo.ownerActors AS ownerActors INNER JOIN pr.processInfo.assignedActors AS assignedActors INNER JOIN pr.processAttributesSet AS processAttribut WHERE ownerActors.actorID IN (:P_OWNER_ID) AND assignedActors.actor.actorID IN (:P_ASSIGNED_ID) AND processAttribut.attributeValue IN (:P_ATTRIBUTE_VALUE) AND processAttribut.attributeName = UPPER (:P_ATTRIBUTE_NAME) AND pr.versionId = (SELECT MAX(procV.versionId) FROM com.mckesson.eig.workflow.process.api.ProcessVersionInfo procV WHERE procV.processInfo.processId = pr.processInfo.processId)
